message:
chore: add ephemeral debug artifact patterns to .gitignore

Ignore row_skip_dy* files (widget debug output) and --graph-format.svg
(bv graph export artifacts) to keep working tree clean in multi-agent
environments.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -60,3 +60,7 @@ __pycache__/
 
 # Beads history snapshots (JSONL export is tracked, history is local)
 .beads/.br_history/
+
+# Ephemeral debug/test output files (agent artifacts)
+row_skip_dy*
+--graph-format.svg
